title: Update vendor of containers/storage and containers/common

comments.body: @mtrmac, the primary reason is to not have to worry whether we need to care or not, I guess.

FWIW, I do prefer bumping c/storage, getting that into c/image, then dancing up from there.  Especially for a big release.  It probably shouldn't matter, but I've too many scars from relying on probably not happening.
